_comment: LISTENING PROBE, not a demo. MOTION is pinned at 1.0 (maximum scatter) for the whole render while SIZE steps through four values. Question it answers: is grain LENGTH the missing lever for 'fog', or is the position-scatter ceiling (kScatterPosFrac = 0.25) the thing holding it back? MOTION currently scatters position, pan, spawn timing and octave but changes neither grain length nor density, so if a longer SIZE reads as fog here, the fix is cheap and needs no retuning of the scatter constants. Synth silenced throughout.

init._comment: part A silenced: zero base AND LEVEL modulation off
MOTION pinned at maximum scatter, unmodulated, for the entire render
SIZE parked and unmodulated too, so the steps below are the only thing moving it

events._comment: 35-42s: SIZE 1.0 -> 2 s, clamped to the ~8 s of content
